todos.content: Check gpt-5.4-mini availability via OpenAI OAuth in OpenCode
Add gpt-5.4-mini to openai whitelist + models definition in opencode.jsonc
Review and update oh-my-openagent_openai.jsonc if needed
Review and update oh-my-openagent_openai-google-hybrid.jsonc — add gpt-5.4-mini where appropriate (quick category, etc.)
Verify all configs are valid JSONC after edits

input.command: opencode models 2>&1 | grep -i "gpt-5.4-mini" || echo "NOT FOUND IN MODELS LIST"

input.prompt:
1. TASK: Inspect this dotfiles repo for all relevant local uses of gpt-5.4-mini and model-selection patterns.
2. EXPECTED OUTCOME: Return concrete file paths and brief notes explaining where gpt-5.4-mini is already used, where openai model whitelists are defined, and whether any nearby configs should be kept aligned with opencode/opencode.jsonc.
3. REQUIRED TOOLS: read, grep, glob only.
4. MUST DO: Search for gpt-5.4-mini, model whitelists, quick category mappings, and oh-my-openagent config patterns. Include only findings relevant to updating these configs safely.
5. MUST NOT DO: Do not edit files. Do not speculate beyond the repo. Do not search unrelated directories.
6. CONTEXT: Target files already identified include /Users/tim/dev/dotfiles/opencode/opencode.jsonc, /Users/tim/dev/dotfiles/opencode/oh-my-openagent_openai.jsonc, and /Users/tim/dev/dotfiles/opencode/oh-my-openagent_openai-google-hybrid.jsonc. I need these findings to decide the exact local config edits.

1. TASK: Research external guidance relevant to using openai/gpt-5.4-mini in Oh My OpenAgent/OpenCode configs.
2. EXPECTED OUTCOME: Summarize whether gpt-5.4-mini is recommended for quick/utility roles, and note any warnings about using it for orchestrator or specialist roles.
3. REQUIRED TOOLS: context7, web search, official docs reading only.
4. MUST DO: Focus on official or highly credible sources and the provided OmO model-matching guidance. Prioritize configuration implications for quick category and lightweight agents.
5. MUST NOT DO: Do not edit files. Do not provide generic model comparisons. Do not wander into unrelated OpenAI pricing discussions.
6. CONTEXT: I am updating OpenCode and Oh My OpenAgent config files in a dotfiles repo. The user wants gpt-5.4-mini added only where it is actually appropriate and available.
